Wall Module¶

Wall entity module.

Represent an impassable obstacle in the game world.

class model.entities.objects.wall.Wall(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Entity

Represent an impassable world object.

Used as a blocking element in the map grid. Prevents movement of players and other entities through its position.

__COLOR = (0, 255, 0)¶

Visual color representation (RGB).

__EXPECTED_PARAMETERS: dict[str, type] = {}¶

Wall has no additional initialization parameters.

__ID_PREFIX: str = 'W'¶

Unique prefix for Wall entities.

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶

RPG Game
